# Upstream Snapshot

- upstream repo: `git@github.com:karpathy/autoresearch.git`
- pinned commit: `228791fb499afffb54b46200aca536f79142f117`
- capture date: `2026-04-18`

This snapshot is vendored as a reference surface for bounded training ideas and
workflow structure. The repo-owned D5 training lane does not give this vendor
authority over SQL truth, QMD evidence, or runtime governance.

The upstream project centers on agent-edited training code with a fixed
five-minute evaluation loop. D5 reuses the autonomy idea, but binds adaptation
to proposal review/comparison, paper-only profile revisions, and canonical SQL
receipts.
